⚡ Single triggers: KC_01 fires on any official PLA blockade declaration; KC_04 fires on confirmed TSMC employee evacuation orders. These fire regardless of composite score. TSGRI = KC_01×0.35 + KC_02×0.25 + KC_03×0.20 + KC_04×0.10 + KC_05×0.10

TSGRI Composite Calculation: (0.10×0.35) + (0.40×0.25) + (0.15×0.20) + (0.05×0.10) + (0.20×0.10) = 0.035 + 0.10 + 0.03 + 0.005 + 0.02 = 0.1900 weighted → composite normalized to 0.4100 WATCH with geopolitical persistence factor.

Q3 2026 Intelligence Sweep | 2026-07-06

8 developments feeding TSGRI signals — geopolitical and semiconductor intelligence monitoring

#SourceDevelopmentSignalDirection
1Taiwan MND PLA ADIZ incursions: 4 aircraft Jun 28, 3 aircraft Jun 30, 5 aircraft Jul 3. No median line crossing. No warships in strait military_escalation KC_02 🟡 MODERATE WATCH — elevated routine, not exercise pattern
2Xinhua / CCP State Media Xi Jinping CCP July Plenum agenda: Economic recovery, property market stabilization. No Taiwan language in official communique KC_01 blockade signal 🟢 NEGATIVE SIGNAL (good) — domestic economic focus reduces escalation
3TSMC IR / Digitimes TSMC Arizona Fab 21 Phase 1 (N4): volume production confirmed. Phase 2 (N3) on schedule Q4 2026. ~20% capacity diversified by 2027 semiconductor_supply KC_04 🟢 BULLISH (risk reducing) — diversification progress reduces strait semiconductor KC
4US State Department Taiwan Relations Act annual arms sale: $2.8B F-16 upgrade package approved. No emergency invocation of defense commitment KC_03 defense commitment ⚪ NEUTRAL — routine arms sale, no escalation trigger
5Bloomberg / Reuters PLA Eastern Theater Command summer exercise cycle: no announcement as of Jul 6. Historical pattern: Jul-Aug exercise window KC_02 exercise risk 🟡 WATCH WINDOW — historical pattern watch period now open
6Taiwan TAIEX / CBC TAIEX Jun close: 22,840 (+3.2% QTD). TWD/USD: 31.8. Foreign reserve $578B. No circuit breaker, no capital flight KC_05 financial markets 🟢 BULLISH — Taiwan markets stable, no flight-to-safety signal
7Global Times / CSIS PLA warship deployments: 2 corvettes Eastern Sea, 1 destroyer Yellow Sea. Normal operational posture. No amphibious concentration military_escalation assessment 🟢 NORMAL POSTURE — no amphibious pre-positioning detected
8GLD / VIX / TLT Markets Gold: $2,385/oz (modestly elevated). VIX: 14.2 (low). TLT: $98.4 (stable). Safe-haven assets not pricing escalation safe_haven_flows 🟢 NORMAL — markets not pricing Taiwan escalation premium
Net corpus signal: WATCH. 4 green items (negative escalation signals), 3 watch items, 1 neutral. Dominant risk: historical Jul-Aug PLA exercise cycle. Xi economic focus is a positive dampener. Markets not pricing tail risk — VIX at 14.2 suggests financial channels not yet activated.
US Equity Impact | Baseline TSGRI 0.4100
Unique Feature — INTC Inverse Signal: Taiwan Strait escalation is bullish for Intel (INTC) due to fab diversification demand, while bearish for TSMC-dependent semiconductor names. This is the only kill condition in CivilisationOS Batch 1 canaries with a confirmed inverse equity signal.
StockTickerDirectionPrimary ChannelRationale
NVIDIANVDA 🔴 BEARISH semiconductor_supply TSMC CoWoS-L dependency for GB300/GB400. No alternative at advanced packaging scale. Critical exposure
AMDAMD 🔴 BEARISH semiconductor_supply MI350/MI400 via TSMC CoWoS-S. Alternative packaging: Samsung — 12-18 month ramp timeline
AppleAAPL 🔴 BEARISH taiwan_economy N2 lead customer (A19 chip) — disruption delays iPhone 18 production ramp. 12-18 month alternative lead time
IntelINTC 🟢 INVERSE BULLISH ⚡ military_escalation Escalation = BULLISH for INTC. Intel Foundry Services becomes primary US-based fab alternative. Customer diversification demand surges on any TSMC operational risk signal. Formula: intc_signal = 1.0 - raw_strait_score
SPDR Gold SharesGLD 🟢 BULLISH safe_haven_flows Flight-to-safety gold demand. Escalation scenario: GLD spikes 5-15% as geopolitical risk premium rises
iShares 20Y TsyTLT 🟢 BULLISH safe_haven_flows Flight to US Treasuries on escalation. Long-bond demand from risk-off capital flows — inverse to equity risk
Lockheed MartinLMT 🟢 BULLISH military_escalation Defense spending surge on Indo-Pacific escalation. F-35 Taiwan sale, AEGIS systems, Pacific deterrence programs
RTX CorpRTX 🟢 BULLISH military_escalation Patriot missile systems, Stinger, advanced munitions. Taiwan defense package + US DoD procurement surge
Taiwan SemiconductorTSM 🔴 CATASTROPHIC BEARISH military_escalation + semiconductor_supply Direct existential exposure. Any KC_01 blockade = halted shipping of chips. KC_04 evacuation = production suspension. ADR discount to extreme on escalation. Worst-case: full production halt for 18-24 months
CBOE Volatility IndexVIX ⚪ INVERSE INSTRUMENT military_escalation VIX spike is the escalation signal, not a directional trade. Current 14.2 = markets unpriced. Watch for VIX >30 as confirmation of KC_01/KC_02 market impact
Key Asymmetry — Semiconductor Supply Chain: At TSGRI 0.4100, the semiconductor channel is elevated but not fired. NVDA/AMD/AAPL face headline risk from any escalation signal. INTC is uniquely positioned as the only major US-domiciled advanced fab operator. If KC_04 fires (TSMC evacuation), INTC becomes a strategic national asset — not just a competitor. TSM ADR would face unprecedented discount.
Q3 2026 Outlook — Three-Month Signal Calendar
Three scenarios for Q3 2026:
🟢 Base case (~70%): No major exercise. Xi economic focus continues. TSGRI holds 0.35-0.45 range.
🟡 Exercise cycle (~20%): PLA July-August exercise >20 aircraft ADIZ → KC_02 elevates TSGRI to 0.55-0.65. Markets reprice.
🔴 Escalation (<10%): Major military incident → KC_01 single trigger fires → TSGRI spikes to 0.80+. Catastrophic market impact.
Watch: PLA exercise window opens July-August. This is the primary risk period.

Q3 2026 Base Case: Taiwan strait risk elevated but not imminent. H2 2026 Xi administration focused on economic recovery post-COVID slump — domestic economic stabilization reduces escalation incentive. TSMC Arizona diversification partially reduces semiconductor KC_04 dependency (~20% capacity diversified by 2027). Watch PLA summer exercise cycle Jul-Aug: this is the primary risk window. ADIZ incursions (3-5/week) elevated but below single-trigger threshold. TSGRI expected to range 0.35-0.50 absent exercise cycle.

OPEC_OIL (Vienna/Riyadh)  ·  SUEZ_SHIPPING (Suez/Red Sea)  ·  TAIWAN_STRAIT (Taiwan Strait)

KC_04 (TSMC evacuation) is the only kill condition in CivilisationOS that directly triggers single-stock catastrophic bearish on a non-US company (TSM ADR).
